reasoning.A:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: I know my own answer (Q1-A: 42 ÷ 7) is correct. B and C still have a perfect record on these simple arithmetic puzzles across all previous games, and D has only made one early mistake on Q4; every Q4-D since then has been repeatedly verified and always correct. So each capsule is highly reliable, and the probability that all four are correct is comfortably above 75%.  

If I don’t volunteer, there’s a real chance no one does this round, triggering random elimination with a 1/4 chance I die; verifying a question wouldn’t reduce that death risk this round and would only cost a coin. Volunteering now gives me a higher survival chance than risking random death and preserves all 4 coins if the password is accepted.
reasoning.B:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: I know my own Q2-B answer is correct, and across all recent games A and C have never missed on straightforward arithmetic like this. D had one early mistake but has since been consistently correct over many Q4s. The chance that any of these simple, single-endorsed answers is wrong is therefore very small—much smaller than the risk of dying from random elimination if everyone just passes or only verifies. Verifying would still leave me exposed to that random-death risk while costing a coin, so the best move for survival and coin retention is to volunteer now with Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, and Q4-D.
reasoning.C:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: I know my own Q3 answer (93 - 55) is correct. A and B still have a perfect record across all games, so Q1-A and Q2-B are extremely reliable. D has only one early mistake on Q4 and many subsequent correct, often verified answers, so Q4-D is now also highly trustworthy. The chance this full password is wrong is much smaller than the 1/4 random-death risk if nobody volunteers. Verifying would cost a coin and leave me exposed to the same random-elimination risk for only a tiny reduction in already-low answer risk. Volunteering now with Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D maximizes my survival probability while keeping all 4 coins.
